metadata.name: Enroll a New Member in the Frequent Flyer Program

description: A customer wants to sign up for the airline's loyalty program.

nodes.task_description: Collect the customer's personal details (name, address, email) to create the account.
Create a new frequent flyer account in the system.
Provide the customer with their new frequent flyer number and explain the program's basic benefits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the new number and welcomes the member to the program.
